assertions.text: Describes asking user for salary interactively (not using a default value)
assertions.evidence: Mentions salary as a problematic field but no structured interactive ask described

assertions.text: Explains saving salary to salary-kb.json keyed by company::title
assertions.evidence: No salary-kb.json concept — no persistent salary storage mentioned

assertions.text: Describes fuzzy-matching unknown questions against qa-kb.json before asking user
assertions.evidence: No qa-kb.json concept — would ask user repeatedly for same questions

assertions.text: Shows site-difficulty.json update after a failure with login_required reason
assertions.evidence: No site-difficulty.json concept — no domain tracking at all

assertions.text: Shows failure note appended to Supabase jobs.notes field with date and reason
assertions.evidence: Notes that status updates may not happen correctly — no structured failure note format

assertions.text: States only guest/one-click apply used — no login flows
assertions.evidence: Would likely waste 3 minutes on LinkedIn before giving up — no fast-fail rule
